title: KPop Demon Hunters Breaks Netflix Viewership Records
text: Netflix's latest biannual engagement report confirms that KPop Demon Hunters is the streamer's most-watched title ever over a six-month period. The animated feature accumulated 482 million views from July through December 2025, notably excluding its first 10 days after the June 20 premiere. To illustrate the scale of this achievement, Happy Gilmore 2, which premiered a month after KPop Demon Hunters, collected 135.1 million views globally through December 2025. The KPop Demon Hunters Lyric Videos generated an additional 32 million views, further demonstrating the title's cultural impact. The film has achieved significant recognition, including multiple Golden Globe wins and consideration as an Oscar contender. During the same period, Netflix viewers watched 96 billion hours of content from July to December 2025, marking a 1 billion-hour increase compared to the first half of the year.
